name: LATE_ENTRANT_ASSIGNEES_BY_TARGETPAIR_AFTER_YEAR
description: Assignees that first appear on a target pair after a given year.
cypher: MATCH (tp:TargetPair {name:$tp_name})<-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]-(p:Patent)-[:HAS_ASSIGNEE]->(a:Assignee) MATCH (p)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(y:Year) WITH a, min(y.year) AS first_year, count(DISTINCT p) AS patent_count WHERE first_year > $year RETURN a.name AS assignee, first_year, patent_count ORDER BY first_year ASC, patent_count DESC, assignee LIMIT 20;
